ASTROLUPINE-PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION.descrip: #The next !Magic! Attack cards you play will [gold]Write[/gold] their damage to the [gold]Attack Register[/gold].

Deal damage 1 additional time for every 8 points in your [gold]Attack Register[/gold].

#Deal !D! damage.
If Fatal, permanently increase this card's base damage by !Magic!.

ASTROLUPINE-VEST_ASSAULT.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
If this is the first card you play this turn, double its damage.

ASTROLUPINE-DULL_CRYSTAL.description:
#For each !Magic! points of [gold]Attack Register[/gold],apply 1 [gold]Trojan Horse Virus[/gold]
Deal !D! damage.

ASTROLUPINE-MIMIC_RECKLESS_IMPACT.descri:
#Deal damage equal to [gold]Defense Register[/gold]
(Deal !D! damage)
Gain !Magic! [gold]Defense Overwrite[/gold].
ASTROLUPINE-OPERATOR_IMPACT.title: Operator Impact
ASTROLUPINE-OPERATOR_IMPACT.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
If you have played a Skill this turn, gain !B! Block.
ASTROLUPINE-GET_TOKEN.title: Steal Token
ASTROLUPINE-GET_TOKEN.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
If the target has [gold]Trojan Horse Virus[/gold], gain 1 [E].
ASTROLUPINE-BUFFER_OVERFLOW.title: Buffer Overflow
ASTROLUPINE-RHOMBUS_SLICER.title: Rhombus Slicer
ASTROLUPINE-PARALLEL_PROCESSING.title: Parallel Processing
ASTROLUPINE-PARALLEL_PROCESSING.descript: #For this turn, all registers' values are doubled when [gold]Read[/gold].
ASTROLUPINE-KERNEL_HARDENING.title: Kernel Hardening
ASTROLUPINE-KERNEL_HARDENING.description: #[gold]Attack Register[/gold] and [gold]Defense Register[/gold]'s minimum values are increased to !Magic!.
ASTROLUPINE-EXCEPTION_HANDLING.title: Exception Handling
ASTROLUPINE-EXCEPTION_HANDLING.descripti: #Whenever a register value changes, deal !Magic! damage to ALL enemies.
ASTROLUPINE-LONE_WOLF.title: Lone Wolf
ASTROLUPINE-BOTNET.title: Botnet
ASTROLUPINE-BOTNET.description: #At the start of your turn, gain !Magic! Block for each layer of [gold]Zero-Day Exploit[/gold] on all enemies.
ASTROLUPINE-LUPINE_INTUITION.title: Lupine Intuition
ASTROLUPINE-LUPINE_INTUITION.description: #Whenever an enemy is inflicted with [gold]Trojan Horse Virus[/gold] or [gold]Zero-Day Exploit[/gold], gain !Magic! Block.
ASTROLUPINE-EXPLOIT_ANOMALY.title: Exploit Anomaly
ASTROLUPINE-EXPLOIT_ANOMALY.description: #At the start of your turn, if you have any Overwrite effect, gain !Magic! [E] and Draw !Cards! cards.
ASTROLUPINE-COOLING_ARCHITECTURE.title: Cooling Architecture
ASTROLUPINE-COOLING_ARCHITECTURE.descrip: #At the start of your turn, if the [gold]Attack Register[/gold] is at least !Magic!, draw 2 cards.
ASTROLUPINE-OPERATOR_OVERLOADING.title: Operator Overloading
ASTROLUPINE-DAEMON.title: Daemon
ASTROLUPINE-FORMAT_STRIKE.title: Format Strike
ASTROLUPINE-FORMAT_STRIKE.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
Remove all [gold]Trojan Horse Virus[/gold] from the target. For each stack removed, increase the base damage of all Format Strikes by !Increase! in this battle.
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT_ACCESS_ASSAULT.title: Root Access Assault
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT_ACCESS_ASSAULT.descript:
#Deal !D! damage.
If the target intends to Attack, [gold]Write[/gold] a value equal to the damage dealt to the [gold]Defense Register[/gold].
ASTROLUPINE-GARBAGE_COLLECTION.title: Garbage Collection
ASTROLUPINE-GARBAGE_COLLECTION.descripti: #Exhaust all cards in your discard pile. Deal !D! damage for each card Exhausted.
ASTROLUPINE-ZERO_DAY_BLAST.title: Zero-Day Blast
ASTROLUPINE-ZERO_DAY_BLAST.description:
#Remove the target's Block and apply !Magic! [gold]Zero-Day Exploit[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
ASTROLUPINE-DEADLOCK.title: Deadlock
ASTROLUPINE-DEADLOCK.description:
#Deal !D! damage 2 times.
Deal additional damage equal to !Magic! times the target's [gold]Trojan Horse Virus[/gold] stacks.
ASTROLUPINE-SUDO_STRIKE.title: Sudo Strike
ASTROLUPINE-SUDO_STRIKE.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
Costs !Magic! less for each stack of [gold]Attack Overwrite[/gold] you have.
ASTROLUPINE-REDIRECT.title: Redirect
ASTROLUPINE-REDIRECT.description:
#Gain !B! Block.
Lock all registers for the next 2 turns.
ASTROLUPINE-CRON_JOB.title: Cron Job
ASTROLUPINE-CRON_JOB.description:
#Gain !Magic! [gold]Attack Overwrite[/gold], !Magic2! [gold]Defense Overwrite[/gold], and !Magic3! [gold]Draw Overwrite[/gold].
Take an extra turn.
ASTROLUPINE-LOW_LEVEL_REFACTORING.title: Low Level Refactoring
ASTROLUPINE-LOW_LEVEL_REFACTORING.descri: #Add [gold]Write[/gold] to all Attack cards in your hand.
ASTROLUPINE-SYSTEM_SNAPSHOT.title: System Snapshot
ASTROLUPINE-SYSTEM_SNAPSHOT.description: #Gain [gold]Overwrite Effect[/gold] equal to the current values of all registers
ASTROLUPINE-CONSOLE_AGENT.title: Console Agent
ASTROLUPINE-SANDBOX_MODE.title: Sandbox Mode
ASTROLUPINE-SANDBOX_MODE.description: #For this turn, your [gold]Write[/gold] effects no longer change register values, but instead gain Overwrite Effect equal to -the-+twice of+ card's value.
ASTROLUPINE-DYNAMIC_LINKING.title: Dynamic Linking
ASTROLUPINE-DYNAMIC_LINKING.description:
#Draw !Cards! cards.
For this turn, each time you play a card with [gold]Read[/gold], gain 1 [E].
(Current gain: !EnergyGain! [E])
ASTROLUPINE-KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH.title: Knowledge Graph
ASTROLUPINE-KNOWLEDGE_GRAPH.description:
#At the start of your turn, put !Magic! cards from your draw pile into your hand.
They gain [gold]Write[/gold] this turn.
ASTROLUPINE-D_A_CONVERSION.title: D/A Conversion
ASTROLUPINE-D_A_CONVERSION.description:
#Gain 1 Strength for every !Magic! points in [gold]Attack Register[/gold].
Gain 1 Dexterity for every !Magic2! points in [gold]Defense Register[/gold].
Then set all registers to 2.
ASTROLUPINE-DEEP_LEARNING.title: Deep Learning
ASTROLUPINE-DEEP_LEARNING.description: #Whenever you play a card with [gold]Read[/gold] or [gold]Write[/gold], deal !Magic! damage to a random enemy.
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT.title: Root Access
ASTROLUPINE-ROOT.description: #[gold]Read[/gold] effects for your [gold]Attack Register[/gold] and [gold]Defense Register[/gold] will read the higher value between the two.
ASTROLUPINE-HYPER_THREADING_FORM.title: Hyper-Threading Form
ASTROLUPINE-HYPER_THREADING_FORM.descrip: #The first [gold]Write[/gold] card you play each turn writes double its value.
ASTROLUPINE-OPEN_SOURCE_PROTOCOL.title: Open Source Protocol
ASTROLUPINE-OPEN_SOURCE_PROTOCOL.descrip: #Whenever you gain any Overwrite Effect, the corresponding register increase by a same value.
ASTROLUPINE-TURING_COMPLETE.title: Turing Complete
ASTROLUPINE-TURING_COMPLETE.description: #Whenever you play a card with both [gold]Read[/gold] and [gold]Write[/gold], Draw !Cards! cards.
ASTROLUPINE-REMOTE_EXECUTE.title: Remote Execute
ASTROLUPINE-REMOTE_EXECUTE.description:
#Remove all [gold]Zero-Day Exploit[/gold] from ALL enemies.
Gain !Magic! Block for each stack removed.
ASTROLUPINE-FEEDBACK_SYSTEM.title: Feedback System
ASTROLUPINE-FEEDBACK_SYSTEM.description: #Gain Block equal to your [gold]Defense Overwrite[/gold]-.-+ times 2.+
ASTROLUPINE-PROLIFERATE_ALGORITHM.title: Proliferate Algorithm
ASTROLUPINE-PROLIFERATE_ALGORITHM.descri: #[gold]Trojan Horse Virus[/gold] stacks no longer decrease over time, but instead increase by !Magic! each turn.
ASTROLUPINE-REUSE.title: Reuse
ASTROLUPINE-REUSE.description: #For each stack of [gold]Zero-Day Exploit[/gold] applied this combat, apply 1 stack of [gold]Trojan Horse Virus[/gold] to the target.
ASTROLUPINE-DEBT_SETTLEMENT.title: Debt Settlement
ASTROLUPINE-DEBT_SETTLEMENT.description:
#Deal !D! damage.
For each stack of [gold]Overwrite Effect[/gold], this card's damage increases by !Magic!.
ASTROLUPINE-MELTDOWN.title: Meltdown
ASTROLUPINE-LESION.title: Lesion
ASTROLUPINE-LESION.description:
#(Deal !D! damage !Times! times.)
Deal damage 1 additional time for each stack of [gold]Trojan Horse Virus[/gold] on the enemy.
ASTROLUPINE-MIMIC_CATALYST.title: Mimic: Catalyst
ASTROLUPINE-MIMIC_BLASPHEMY.title: Mimic: Blasphemy
